title: Gooey Adventurous Ukrainian Boudin-Blanc Pierogi
description: Savory Ukrainian pierogi filled with boudin blanc, topped with a manteca-re emulsion and garnished with fresh herbs. This recipe is Ayurvedic sattvic-friendly and perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Combine flour, warm water, and salt in a large mixing bowl and knead until smooth.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Use a round cookie cutter to cut out circles of dough.
Place a tablespoon of boudin blanc in the center of each dough circle and fold the dough in half to form a half-circle shape.
Press the edges together with a fork to seal the pierogi.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pierogi for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the manteca emulsion by whisking together melted manteca, apple cider vinegar, and a pinch of salt.
Drain the pierogi and serve hot with the manteca emulsion spooned over the top and garnished with fresh parsley.
